parsing_rules: Legislative definitions sections (subsection (a)) contain key operational terms (COVERED INDIVIDUAL, DECEPTIVE AI-GENERATED AUDIO OR VISUAL MEDIA, FEDERAL ELECTION ACTIVITY) that function as role qualifiers rather than entities themselves; extract their associated entity types separately.

oddities.note: Section structure uses nested quotation marks for amended statutory text (amending Title III of Federal Election Campaign Act), creating embedded legislative language within the bill text. Exemptions in subsection (c) reference broadcaster and publisher categories rather than specific named entities, suggesting categorical rather than organizational entity carveouts.
